attrs.name: SwitchON
attrs.desc: On/Off button

attrs.name: Mode
attrs.desc: Mode switching, 0:AP control, 1:Wireless control

attrs.name: FeedSwitch
attrs.desc: Feeding switch

attrs.name: Fault_Overcurrent
attrs.desc: Motor current too high, including short circuit fault

attrs.name: Fault_Overvoltage
attrs.desc: Motor overvoltage

attrs.name: Fault_OverTemp
attrs.desc: Motor temperature too high

attrs.name: Fault_Undervoltage
attrs.desc: Motor undervoltage

attrs.name: Fault_Lockedrotor
attrs.desc: Motor locked rotor

attrs.name: Fault_no_liveload
attrs.desc: No load

attrs.name: Fault_UART
attrs.desc: Module cannot connect to mainboard

attrs.name: TimerON
attrs.desc: 0:Timer off, 1:Timer on

attrs.name: AutoMode
attrs.desc: Current timer mode: 0:Shutdown;1:Auto;2:Feeding

attrs.name: Motor_Speed
attrs.desc: Motor gear, range 30~100, motor stops when 0

attrs.name: FeedTime
attrs.desc: Feeding duration

attrs.name: AutoGears
attrs.desc: Current timer gear

attrs.name: AutoFeedTime
attrs.desc: Current timer feeding time

attrs.name: YMDData
attrs.desc: Date, Byte1: thousands and hundreds of year, Byte2: tens of year, Byte3: month, Byte4: day

attrs.name: HMSData
attrs.desc: Time, Byte1: Empty, Byte2: Hour, Byte3: Minute, Byte4: Second

attrs.name: AutoTime00
attrs.desc: Byte0: Start Hour, Byte1: Start Minute, Byte2: End Hour, Byte3: End Minute, Byte4: Mode, 0: Stop, 1: Automatic, 2: Feeding, Byte5: Pause Time Level = 0
